title: Protein Supplements Market to Grow at 7.7% CAGR by 2031 Fueled by Rising Sports Nutrition Demand and Health and Wellness Trends, Reports Mordor Intelligence
author: Mordor Intelligence
description: The global protein supplements market is projected to grow from USD 30.30 billion in 2026 to USD 43.98 billion by 2031, driven by mainstream fitness adoption, plant-based innovations, RTD products, and rapid Asia-Pacific expansion. Growth is supported by social media influence, sports sponsorships, technological advancements in protein extraction, and expanding consumer segments beyond traditional athletes.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Major multinational nutrition company competing in the moderately concentrated market. Positioned to benefit from market growth driven by fitness trends, personalized nutrition platforms, and subscription-based services.

Key player in protein supplements market with access to advanced retail infrastructure and omnichannel distribution networks. Well-positioned to capitalize on RTD innovation and personalized nutrition trends.
Major competitor in the protein supplements market with strong distribution capabilities. Benefits from growing RTD protein beverage demand and innovation in convenient nutrition solutions.
Listed as a key company in the expanding protein supplements market. Positioned to benefit from growing consumer demand across multiple segments and geographic regions.
Listed as a key company in the growing protein supplements market with 7.7% CAGR through 2031. Benefits from expanding fitness participation, plant-based innovation trends, and RTD product demand.

title: Worried About Inflation? This International ETF Could Help Protect Your Portfolio
author: Ben Gran
description: As inflation rises to 3.8% in April, investors are seeking protection strategies. The article recommends dividend stocks and international equities as inflation hedges. The Vanguard International High Dividend Yield ETF (VYMI) is highlighted as a suitable option, offering a 3.47% dividend yield, low 0.07% expense ratio, and strong historical returns of 21% annually over three years.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The ETF is recommended as an inflation hedge with strong performance metrics (21% annual returns over 3 years, 3.47% dividend yield), low fees (0.07% expense ratio), and diversified holdings across developed markets.
Listed as a top holding in VYMI with emphasis on being a reliable dividend-paying financial stock from developed economies.
Highlighted as a major top holding in the ETF, representing a reliable dividend-paying financial institution.
Featured as a top pharmaceutical holding in VYMI, representing quality dividend-paying companies in developed markets.
Included as a top pharmaceutical company holding in the ETF portfolio.
Mentioned as a well-known food conglomerate holding with strong dividend-paying characteristics.
Listed as a major energy company holding in VYMI with reliable dividend payments.

title: Fish Sauce Market Opportunity Report 2026: $5 Bn Growth Drivers, Trends Analysis, and Global Forecasts 2025-2035
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The global fish sauce market is projected to grow from $3.1 billion in 2025 to $5.1 billion by 2035 at a CAGR of 5.3%, driven by rising international popularity of Southeast Asian cuisines, increasing adoption in processed foods for umami flavoring, and growing consumer preference for natural fermented condiments. North America accounts for $549 million of the market, with expansion fueled by e-commerce accessibility and Asian restaurant growth.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Nestle's Maggi Fish Sauce brand is positioned in an expanding market with growing demand for umami flavoring in processed foods and ready-to-eat meals
As a key market player, Unilever benefits from market expansion driven by increased adoption of fish sauce in food processing and international cuisine trends

title: Nestlé - A Defensive Name With Pricing Power
author: Mighty Wisdom Benzinga Contributor
description: Nestlé is positioned as a defensive investment choice in 2026, offering stability and consistent cash generation rather than high growth. The Swiss food giant benefits from strong pricing power, diversified global operations, and reliable margins, making it attractive in a slower, more selective market environment with modest organic growth guidance of 3-4%.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Nestlé is presented as an attractive defensive investment with strong fundamentals including CHF 89.5 billion in sales, 3.5% organic growth, CHF 14.4 billion in operating profit, and CHF 9.2 billion in free cash flow. The company demonstrates consistent pricing power, reliable margins, and predictable earnings visibility, which are increasingly valuable in uncertain market conditions. The article emphasizes its ability to maintain pricing discipline while preserving volumes and its global diversification reducing domestic economic risk.

title: Dietary Supplements Market Driven by Health and Nutrition Demand
author: Precedence Research
description: The global dietary supplements market is valued at $218.88 billion in 2026 and is expected to reach $430.39 billion by 2035, growing at a CAGR of 7.78%. Growth is driven by rising health awareness, preventive healthcare focus, aging populations, and demand for immunity-boosting products. Vitamins dominate by ingredient (31.80% share), tablets lead by form (32.63%), and OTC supplements command 77.28% of the market. Asia Pacific leads regionally, while North America shows fastest expansion. Key trends include personalized nutrition, plant-based ingredients, and e-commerce distribution.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Listed as a major player in the U.S. market developing science-backed formulations and expanding into personalized nutrition, benefiting from strong market growth projections.
Identified as a key player in the dietary supplements market with opportunities to capitalize on the projected 7.78% CAGR growth through 2035.
Mentioned as a major player and key processor in the value chain, positioned to benefit from growing demand for dietary supplements and functional nutrition products.
Listed among key players in the U.S. dietary supplements market with opportunities in the expanding market projected to grow significantly through 2035.
Identified as a major player in the dietary supplements market positioned to benefit from strong market growth and increasing consumer demand for nutritional products.
